metadata.description: Globally unique App Service name (becomes https://<name>.azurewebsites.net).
GitHub repository URL for this application.
Your Entra Verified ID issuer DID.
Entra ID tenant ID for agent sign-in.
App registration client ID for agent sign-in (redirect URI: https://<webAppName>.azurewebsites.net/signin-oidc).
Display name shown in the portal header.
Create Application Insights for audit telemetry. Set to false if Microsoft.OperationalInsights cannot be registered on this subscription.

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'SCM_COMMAND_IDLE_TIMEOUT', 'value', '600'), createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'true')), if(parameters('enableApplicationInsights'), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('appInsightsName'))).ConnectionString)), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'VerifiedID__DidAuthority', 'value', parameters('DidAuthority')), createObject('name', 'VerifiedID__ManagedIdentity', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'VerifiedID__EnableFaceCheck', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'AppSettings__CompanyName', 'value', parameters('companyName')), createObject('name', 'AppSettings__PortalTitle', 'value', 'Verified Helpdesk'), createObject('name', 'AppSettings__AuthorizedAgentLabel', 'value', 'Verified Employee'), createObject('name', 'AppSettings__UseTeamsWebhook', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__TenantId', 'value', parameters('AzureAdTenantId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__ClientId', 'value', parameters('AzureAdClientId')), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__Instance', 'value', 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/'), createObject('name', 'AzureAd__CallbackPath', 'value', '/signin-oidc')))]
